testcase.name: test_tunnel_status_endpoint
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_refactoring_regression.py:33: in test_tunnel_status_endpoint assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 520 E assert 520 == 200 E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_email_preview_different_templates
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_refactoring_regression.py:84: in test_email_preview_different_templates assert response.status_code == 200, f"Template '{template}' returned {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Template 'payment' returned 520 E assert 520 == 200 E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_health_endpoint
testcase.failure:
/root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:974: in json return complexjson.loads(self.text, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/__init__.py:346: in loads return _default_decoder.decode(s) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:337: in decode obj, end = self.raw_decode(s, idx=_w(s, 0).end()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:355: in raw_decode raise JSONDecodeError("Expecting value", s, err.value) from None E json.decoder.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: backend/tests/test_refactoring_regression.py:95: in test_health_endpoint data = response.json() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:978: in json raise RequestsJSONDecodeError(e.msg, e.doc, e.pos) E requests.exceptions.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)

testcase.name: test_user_endpoint_reachable

failure.message: AssertionError: Got 520 - controller may have import error assert 520 in [401, 400, 403] + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_refactoring_regression.py:126: in test_user_endpoint_reachable assert response.status_code in [401, 400, 403], f"Got {response.status_code} - controller may have import error" E AssertionError: Got 520 - controller may have import error E assert 520 in [401, 400, 403] E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code
